data.title: Volato Group Announces April 17 Record Date and May 7 Special Meeting Date for Shareholder Vote on Proposed Merger With M2i Global
data.description: Atlanta-based Volato Group, Inc. (NYSE American: SOAR) is set to convene a special shareholder meeting on May 7, 2026, to vote on the planned merger with M2i Global, Inc. The merger aims to bring these two entities together. Shareholders on record by April 17, 2026, will have the voting rights at the meeting. The Company anticipates closing the merger soon after the meeting, pending shareholder agreement and meeting the specified conditions.

data.title: 2026 Hyundai Elantra N TCR Edition Offers Compelling Pricing
data.description: The special TCR Edition of the Hyundai Elantra is priced at $39,250 with a manual gearbox and $40,750 with a dual-clutch transmission (DCT). This model is a celebration of Hyundai's six-consecutive TCR Manufacturers' Championships in the IMSA Michelin Pilot Challenge series. The Elantra N TCR Edition offers unique features and commemorates the successful streak in the racing world.

data.title: Hyundai Fires Up Exhilarating N Performance Parts Line for U.S. Nthusiasts
data.description: A brand-new N Performance Parts range is emphasizing engineered performance and racing-influenced N design charm. The upcoming N Performance Parts will feature motorsports-inspired accessories tailored for Elantra N and IONIQ 5 N models, along with forthcoming N variants. These parts will include a carbon-fiber rear wing among other enhancements.

data.title: 'Functional Unemployment' Improves But Wages Down, Says Ludwig Institute
data.description: In Q1 of 2026, despite a decrease in functional unemployment rates across all demographics in March and a decline in labor force participation rates, median weekly wages remained stagnant. The data shows a concerning trend where wages failed to increase despite the overall improvement in employment numbers. This indicates a disconnect between the job market and workers' compensation. The median weekly wage for Q1 experienced a year-over-year decline, pointing towards a challenging economic environment for workers. This situation raises questions about the quality of jobs being offered and the level of compensation provided to employees. The need to address this issue is crucial for ensuring a fair and sustainable labor market.

data.title: Meta raises prices of Quest VR due to global RAM shortage after PS5 sales surge, along with other tech price increases.
data.description: A worldwide shortage of RAM has led to Meta increasing prices for Quest 3 and Quest 3S models, joining the trend of escalating prices for electronic devices. This shortage has impacted various industries, resulting in price hikes to combat the limited supply, with Meta being the latest company affected. The prices for Quest 3 and Quest 3S have been raised as a result of this global RAM shortage, showcasing the widespread consequences of the current market conditions.

data.title: Bank Of America Beats Q1 Expectations, Analysts Boost Price Targets
data.description: Bank of America Corp (NYSE: BAC) posted positive first-quarter results, as per analysts. Piper Sandler's Scott Siefers reaffirmed a Neutral stance and upped the price target to $59 from $53. Gerard Cassidy from RBC Capital Markets retained an Outperform recommendation with a $59 target. Chris Mcgratty at Keefe, Bruyette & Woods also kept an Outperform rating, increasing the price target to $64 from $63. John McDonald at Truist Securities maintained a Buy rating, raising the price target from $57 to $61. Glenn Schorr of Evercore ISI Group maintained an Outperform rating and hiked the price target from $55 to $61. Bank of America's core results surpassed expectations, posting earnings of $1.11 per share, exceeding the consensus. For the full article, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Crypto exchange announces $334M Bitcoin wallet inaccessible as former CEO disappeared with 4,500 BTC in 2022.
data.description: A Polish cryptocurrency exchange, Zonda, has revealed a Bitcoin wallet address containing $334 million. However, the exchange acknowledged that the private keys to access these funds were not transferred from the former CEO who went missing in 2022. This situation has left the exchange unable to access these significant funds.

data.title: Meitav Investment House (TASE: MTAV) Announces an Exchange Tender Offer to Acquire All Shares of Peninsula, a Subsidiary Operating in the Non-Bank Credit Segment
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Meitav Investment House (TASE: MTAV), based in Tel Aviv, Israel, announced a comprehensive exchange tender offer to purchase all outstanding shares of Peninsula, a subsidiary that is predominantly owned (around 80%) by Meitav Investment House. Peninsula is a company listed on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange and is engaged in various operations.

data.title: Utexo and x402 Enable USDT Payments for the Agent Economy with Near-Instant Settlement
data.description: Today, on April 16, 2026, Utexo revealed a partnership with x402 to introduce USDT functionality to the x402 payment system. This collaboration aims to enable instant, peer-to-peer transactions with settlement capabilities. Utexo serves as the Bitcoin-based platform for executing and finalizing stablecoin transactions, enhancing the efficiency of the x402 protocol.

data.title: Healthcare Career Expo in St. Johns County Connects 160 Attendees with 40 Healthcare Employers
data.description: The first-ever Healthcare Career Expo was held in St. Johns County, Florida on April 16, 2026, signaling a significant step forward in promoting workforce development, economic growth, and community welfare. This event, organized by St. Johns County in collaboration with the local Chamber of Commerce, attracted a notable number of participants and attendees. By focusing on the healthcare sector, the expo aimed to highlight job opportunities and educational pathways in this crucial industry. It served as a platform to connect employers and job seekers, contributing to the county's overall prosperity. The successful event underscored the community's commitment to fostering economic advancement and enhancing the well-being of its residents.

data.title: Higginbotham Grows Alabama Presence, Joining Forces with Montgomery Powerhouse Harmon Dennis Bradshaw (HDB)
data.description: Higginbotham, an employee-owned insurance and financial services firm based in Texas, has partnered with Harmon Dennis. The move, announced on April 16, 2026, is geared towards achieving commercial scale and leveraging mutual strengths. This collaboration provides Higginbotham with a larger platform for growth.
